97: **France**, top of **Group I** on 9 points after five straight wins including a 1-0 defeat of Paraguay via a Kylian Mbappé penalty in the last 16, face **Morocco** — on 7 points and level with one other team from **Group C** — at Gillette Stadium in a rematch of the 2022 semi-final **France** won 2-0. Aurélien Tchouaméni (adductor) is set to miss out for **France** while Manu Koné carries a yellow card from the Paraguay match; **Morocco** are without Ismael Saibari (hamstring), whose absence disrupts the midfield balance that helped them beat the Netherlands on penalties before Azzedine Ounahi's second-half brace and a Soufiane Rahimi substitute goal downed Canada 3-0 in the last 16. **France** are unbeaten in all six all-time meetings with **Morocco** (W4 D2), and a seventh straight unbeaten result would send Didier Deschamps' side — in what he has confirmed is his final tournament in charge — into a semi-final against **Spain** or **Belgium**; **Morocco** can become the first African nation to reach two consecutive tournament semi-finals.
